info.name: Truck Delivery API
info.description:
Truck Delivery Backend — full API collection.

**Variables:** Set `base_url` (default: http://localhost:8080) in the collection variables.

After login, copy the `accessToken` into `customer_token`, `driver_token`, or `admin_token` accordingly.

**Folders:**
- 00 Auth — shared login/register/refresh
- 01 Customer — order lifecycle, tracking, payment
- 02 Driver — onboarding, GPS, shipment, breakdown
- 03 Admin — driver/vehicle/shipment/payment/analytics management

item.name: 00 Auth
item.description: Shared auth endpoints — anonymous, no token required.

item.name: 01 Customer
item.description: All endpoints used by the Customer mobile app. Requires `customer_token`.

item.name: 02 Driver
item.description: All endpoints used by the Driver mobile app. Requires `driver_token`.

exec: // Response: { data: { urls: [{ field, uploadUrl, finalUrl }] } }
// Use entry.uploadUrl to PUT each photo directly to MinIO
// Use entry.finalUrl as the value in the photos object when self-registering

item.name: 03 Admin
item.description: All endpoints requiring Admin role. Requires `admin_token`.
